title: Reinforced Tools
description: A mod that adds a new way to upgrade your items!
body:
![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15a2c7a389085bc0a9af2ab5e8542bcd8b044f46.png)


Have you ever wished that your tools were more durable, but not too durable, so as not to take anything away from the game? Well, this mod's got you covered!

# Tools, but stronger!


The **Reinforced Tools** mod adds a new Smithing Template: **The Steel Upgrade Smithing Template**! Found exclusively in Weaponsmith Chests, this template allows you to upgrade your regular Tools to **Reinforced Tools**!

This mod also adds an all-new material to the game: **_STEEL_**! Crafted with Iron and Coal, Steel allows the player to make an all-new Steel tool set!

Reinforced Tools range from Reinforced Iron to Reinforced Netherite tools! All Reinforced Tools are **2x** more durable than their non-reinforced counterparts, and have a higher mining speed!

This mod also adds **Obsidian Tools**, which can be crafted using **Obsidian Shards** and **Thick Sticks**! Obsidian Tools also have Reinforced variants.
Obsidian Tools are less durable than diamond, but are sharper and deal more damage.

> Also included in this mod is the ability to craft the following all-new Steel-themed blocks:
> - The Steel Block;
> - The Steel Bars;
> - The Steel Button and Pressure Plate;
> - The Cut Steel Block;
> - The Cut Steel Stairs and Cut Steel Slab.

(This project is ongoing and I plan to make many additions to make this mod much more exciting and refreshing. Please report any issue you have to the **issue tracker**!)
